title: HyperFPS
description: ℹ️HyperFPS is an Modpack optimized to get good performance with a godly-gameplay experience.
body:
# HyperFPS
```
...is an Modpack optimized to get good performance with a godly-gameplay experience.
```
## ⚠️WARNING⚠️
This modpack includes **some mods** that **may** **violate** the **rules** of some servers. This is very **unlikely to get you banned** but _please check if all of the mods are allowed_ on the server you want to play. **For example:** The mods **"Xaero´s Minimap" & "Xaero´s World Map"**, which add a minimap and an worldmap like Google Maps, **could get you banned of some servers.** **_If you want you can remove them, disable or delete them._** You can also change the modpack to your liking
### Links credits and more
[Click here for more Information & Setup](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JKOJ34qvJvE&list=PLmphQFeMhcSyA0UPankBibujothZMjJDW&pp=gAQBiAQB)
⚠️As this modpack is very new there may be a few buggs, you can reach out trough modrinth if you want to help anything. And no I do not have Discord. I am falsely banned of Discord (Support didn´t answer). So please don´t ask for my Discord
